case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 547 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 13.03.2025 Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioners nor any intimation is received. Lastly this petition was fixed in Court on 29.05.2024 thereafter no such efforts were made to get it fixed in Court for its proceeding. Even otherwise perusal of the prayer clause reflects that this petition is not maintainable. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners, therefore, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
